competencyQuestions.question: Can the system determine whether a NeTEx Service requires a Timetable?
Can the system explain why a Timetable is required for a Service, citing a concrete NeTEx artifact?
Can the system determine whether a ServiceJourneyPattern is optional or mandatory in core NeTEx?
Can the system determine whether a Service instance must have an identifier?
Can the system correctly report that no universally mandatory sub-structure exists for StopPlace in base NeTEx?
Can the system avoid falsely asserting mandatory accessibility, facilities, or sub-stop requirements for StopPlace?
Can the system determine which organisation or actor holds responsibility for a given operational process?
Can the system avoid asserting mandatory OpRa role ownership when no explicit artifact-derived rule is present?
Can the system recognize SIRI realtime monitoring questions without claiming unsupported mandatory constraints?
Can the system identify situation or disruption semantics while preserving source-grounded uncertainty?
Can the system classify DATEX event-oriented questions without inventing non-existent mandatory artifact rules?
